name: Jira Cloud
description: Jira Cloud issue tracking: JQL search, CRUD issues, comments, status transitions. Shares Atlassian credentials with Confluence skill.

credentials_required.label: Atlassian Email
credentials_required.hint: Your Atlassian account email (same across Jira + Confluence).

credentials_required.label: Atlassian API Token
credentials_required.hint: Create at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens. NOTE: Atlassian enforces token expiry (1-365 days) — you will need to rotate it manually.

credentials_required.label: Atlassian Site URL
credentials_required.hint: Your site subdomain, e.g. 'your-org.atlassian.net' (without https:// prefix).

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: List Jira projects (key, name, type, lead)

tools.name: search_issues
tools.description: Search issues with JQL (e.g. 'assignee = currentUser() AND status != Done')

tools.name: get_issue
tools.description: Get full issue detail by key (KAN-1), including description and comments

tools.name: create_issue
tools.description: Create a new issue with project, summary, description, issuetype, assignee, priority, labels

tools.name: update_issue
tools.description: Update issue fields (summary, description, assignee, priority, labels)

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Add a comment to an issue

tools.name: transition_issue
tools.description: Change issue status by transition name (e.g. 'Done', 'In Progress')

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: Search Atlassian users by name or email fragment (returns accountId needed for assignee fields)

tools.name: list_transitions
tools.description: List available status transitions for an issue (use before transition_issue)

tools.name: list_issue_types
tools.description: List valid issue types for a project (Task, Bug, Epic, Subtask, ...)

tools.name: link_issues
tools.description: Link two issues with a relationship (Blocks, Duplicate, Relates, Cloners)

author: freddy-schuetz
